title: rubus canadensis var. terrae-novae
intro: Rubus canadensis var. terrae-novae, also known as New World black raspberry, is a variant of the Rubus canadensis plant, which is a deciduous shrub native to the Americas. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and stems, which contain anthocyanins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids that have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus canadensis var. terrae-novae include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and protect against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
